archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) / Spotify-inspired Custom Dark Theme
design_philosophy: A premium, deeply immersive musical encyclopedia. Emphasizes near-black backgrounds to make album art and visuals pop, using vibrant green accents to guide user action. High contrast, clean geometric typography, and smooth transitions mirror top-tier audio software.

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-black text-white
scales.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-bold text-white

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid for data (charts, top tracks), Tetris Grid for feature showcasing.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-xl for cards, rounded-full for buttons and search inputs

components.cards: Flat background (#181818), no border by default. On hover: bg-[#282828] with subtle scale-up (scale-105). No heavy drop shadows; use color luminance for depth.
components.buttons: Primary: bg-[#1db954] text-black font-bold rounded-full hover:scale-105 hover:bg-[#1ed760] transition-all. Secondary: transparent with 1px border border-[#7A7A7A] text-white rounded-full hover:border-white.
components.header: Sticky navigation, backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#121212]/80. Must have clear search bar (rounded-full) and navigation links.
components.search_input: bg-[#282828] border-transparent rounded-full px-6 py-3 text-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-white transition-all.
components.tables: For Billboard charts: border-b border-[#282828] on rows, hover:bg-[#282828] transition-colors, prominent numbering.

motion.hover_effects: Cards scale by 1.05. Play buttons fade in on card hover. List items background shifts slightly lighter.

hero_background.description: Abstract blurry dark green background to be used with a heavy opacity overlay (bg-black/80) to give a subtle textured dark vibe.

concert_scene.description: Vibrant live concert scene. Can be used for the Blind Test landing or hero banner overlay.

blind_test_bg.description: Silhouetted performers energizing a concert crowd. Use as a background for the blind test game with bg-black/70 overlay.

vinyl_feature.description: Modern vinyl player for decorative feature section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML and Tailwind CSS utilities.
Set the main background to #121212 and text color to #FFFFFF.
Implement the UI in French as requested ('Rechercher des artistes', 'Top 100', 'Blind Test').
Ensure the search bar has a rounded-full aesthetic.
For Artist Detail Page, use a bento grid or 2-column layout (Top Tracks as lists, Albums as grid).
Blind Test game must use YouTube player seamlessly and include score tracking.
Use data-testid attributes on all interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs).
